keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY AVERSIONS. Aversions, to food , etc. : Ars., Nux-v., Pul. Aversions, to food, loathing, disgust, etc. with : Ant-c., Arn., Ars., Cham., Colch., Ip., Kali-c., Nux-v., Op., Pul., Sep. Aversions, to food, acids : Sul. Aversions, to food, beer : Chin. Aversions, to food, bread : Kali-c., Nat-m., Pul., Sul. Aversions, to food, coffee : Nux-v. Aversions, to food, eggs : Fer. Aversions, to food, fats : Nat-m., Petr., Pul. Aversions, to food, meat : Grap., Mur-ac., Petr., Pul., Sep., Sil., Sul. Aversions, to food, milk : Ign., Sep., Sil. Aversions, to food, sweets : Caust., Sul.
